title: Map the current SimpleBond deployment surface and downstream config touchpoints
description: Inspect scripts/deploy.js, hardhat.config.js, README.md, frontend/index.html, and backend/config.mjs to determine what a post-deploy checklist for the active SimpleBond deployment must cover and which networks are actually wired into the product.

title: Add a reusable deployment checklist helper for SimpleBond deployments
description: Create a new script under scripts/ that accepts deployed-contract context such as network, contract name, address, and block metadata, then prints the post-deploy checklist items required after a SimpleBond deployment.

title: Invoke the checklist helper from the SimpleBond deployment flow
description: Update scripts/deploy.js so the normal SimpleBondV4 deployment path automatically prints the new checklist after logging the deployed address, transaction hash, and mined block number.

title: Expose or document the checklist command for operators
description: If the helper is intended to be reused outside deploy.js, add the minimal package.json or README wiring needed so operators know how to invoke it and what follow-up updates it covers.

title: Verify checklist output and supported-network guidance
description: Run the deployment flow in a safe environment such as Hardhat local, or otherwise review the generated output, to confirm the checklist prints the expected verification command and the correct frontend, backend, and README follow-up steps without overstating unsupported chain support.
